content: * <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> + 20% service fee applies at usage

comment.text: This key provides a note explaining that OpenRouter pricing plus a 20% service fee applies to AI usage. It appears as a muted text link within the PricingBillingBody panel of the AI service settings page, likely clarifying billing details for users. Translators should ensure the translated text accurately conveys the fee structure.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'qiymətləndirməsi' means 'assessment' or 'evaluation'. In the context of billing and pricing, 'qiymətləri' (prices) or 'qiymət siyasəti' (pricing policy) should be used to convey 'pricing'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: * <1>OpenRouter qiymətləri</1> + 20% xidmət haqqı istifadə zamanı tətbiq olunur

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in French: 'frais de service' is plural, so the verb should be 's'appliquent' instead of 's'applique'. While the prompt says not to report minor grammar, this is a subject-verb agreement error that affects the professional quality of the UI string.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: * <1>Tarification OpenRouter</1> + 20% de frais de service s'appliquent à l'utilisation

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'cenotne' is a misspelling or incorrect form of 'cenotne' (which doesn't exist in this context); the correct word for 'pricing' is 'cenu politika' or 'cenošana'. Additionally, 'piemīt lietojumā' is a literal and unnatural translation of 'applies at usage', making the sentence semantically awkward in Latvian.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: * <1>OpenRouter cenu politika</1> + 20% pakalpojuma maksa tiek piemērota lietošanas laikā

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase '+ 20% stroškov za storitev se nanaša na uporabo' is grammatically incorrect and conveys a confusing meaning. It literally translates to '+ 20% of costs for service relates to usage', which fails to communicate that a 20% service fee is added to the OpenRouter pricing.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: * <1>Cenik OpenRouter</1> + 20% provizije za storitev ob uporabi

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation uses 'apply-uju', which is an incorrect transliteration of the English verb 'apply' into Serbian. It is not a valid word in Serbian.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Цененик OpenRouter-а</1> + 20% сервисна накнада се наплаћује при коришћењу
